full_text_tesim: Heavily ornamented from ff. 1v-232v including decorative calligraphy with bird elements, ff. 98r- 154r, human figures and faces
Ornamented foliation, f. 74r, zoomorphic, ff. 89v, 98r, feline, f. 47v, serpentine; anthropomorphic, between ff. 178r-232v, ornate cross motif
Ornate elements including peacock ff. 81 v-82r
